text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unusually determined, Oguri Cap asks to extend
today's training session.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I need to work as hard as everyone else in the
academy put together... No, even more than that!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Everyone here runs all the time. Even at this
hour, they're all still running.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Unless I get on their level, I probably won't make
it in the central races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What I'm doing now isn't gonna cut it. If I wanna
win, I have no choice but to train even harder.
choice_data_list: Everyone moves at their own pace.
Everyone moves at their own pace.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What I'm doing now isn't gonna cut it. If I wanna
win, I have no choice but to train even harder.
choice_data_list: Everyone moves at their own pace.
Everyone moves at their own pace.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. Perfect. I'll give it everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, Oguri Cap gets down to business
and completes a lengthy training session.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Am I focusing too hard on other people's
progress?
choice_data_list: You should do things your way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. Okay, let's wind things down
for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap seems to have grasped my point, at
least in her own way. I see her periodically
nodding to herself as she walks away.
